phases.name: Long-press to edit in store view

steps.name: Add onLongPress to TripItemRow for store mode edit
steps.criteria: TripItemRow accepts onLongPress prop; in store mode, long-pressing a staple item calls onLongPress with item name and area; short tap still triggers check-off
steps.scenario_name: long press on store item triggers edit callback

steps.name: Wire StoreView long-press to MetadataBottomSheet edit mode
steps.criteria: StoreView passes onLongPress handler to AisleSection items that opens MetadataBottomSheet in edit mode; saving changes updates staple library and syncs to active trip
steps.scenario_name: store view long-press opens edit sheet and saves changes
